projectName: GovMesh — The Cross-DAO Liquidity & Delegation Layer
description: GovMesh is a multi-layered protocol designed to unify fragmented DAO governance. The architecture consists of four primary subsystems: 1. The Core Registry (on-chain) which manages 'Governance Vaults' where DAOs deposit treasury tokens (UNI, AAVE, ARB). 2. The Delegation Router, which uses ZK-proofs to verify that a delegate has the 'right to act' without revealing the underlying whale or treasury address, maintaining privacy while exercising power. 3. The Yield Engine, which calculates the 'Gov
angle: GovMesh creates a secondary market for governance power by allowing DAOs to 'lease' treasury voting weight to other DAOs via ZK-verified delegation, solving the voter apathy and treasury fragmentation problem.
